name: Brainstorm Game Concept Ideas
description: Conduct creative brainstorming sessions to generate initial game concept setting and theme ideas.

name: Define Unique Selling Points (USPs) and Core Theme
description: Identify the game's unique selling points and establish the core theme and genre as guiding pillars for development.

name: Create Initial Game Pitch Deck
description: Compile a pitch deck with the game overview key features early art mock-ups and market analysis to pitch to stakeholders.

name: Present Game Concept to Stakeholders
description: Present the game concept and pitch deck to stakeholders/executives for greenlighting and initial feedback.

name: Technical Requirements Analysis
description: Analyze GDD to list technical requirements engine capabilities needed and potential development challenges.

name: Select Game Engine and Development Tools
description: Evaluate and choose a game engine and key development tools including source control and build systems.

name: Set Up Development Environment
description: Install and configure the game engine and development tools for the team including version control setup.

name: Art Style Research and Reference Gathering
description: Collect visual references and inspirations for the game's art style including color palettes lighting and mood.

name: Concept Art – Main Protagonist
description: Create concept art illustrations exploring designs for the main character including outfits and silhouettes.

name: Concept Art – Environment (Level 1)
description: Paint a concept piece for the first level's environment to set the tone for world design.

name: Design UI Style Guide
description: Establish the UI style (fonts colors button styles) consistent with overall game art direction.

name: Implement HUD UI
description: Implement the in-game HUD (health stamina bars mini-map) in the engine scripting basic functionality.

name: Implement Menu UI
description: Code and assemble the main menu pause menu and settings screens.

name: Model Main Character (High Poly)
description: Create a detailed high-poly 3D model of the main character based on concept art.

name: Retopologize and Texture Main Character
description: Create a game-ready low-poly model from the high-poly sculpt and texture it.

name: Implement Core Combat System (Melee)
description: Begin coding the core combat system in the engine supporting light attacks heavy attacks and combos.

name: Implement Target Lock-On System
description: Add a lock-on feature to allow players to focus on specific enemies during combat.

name: Implement Enemy AI Framework
description: Set up the basic AI framework/state machine for enemies (idle patrol chase attack flee states).

name: Implement Enemy Combat Behaviors
description: Program enemy attacks defenses and special moves; ensure each enemy type behaves according to design.

name: Design Audio Style and Themes
description: Decide on an overall audio direction: orchestral score vs. electronic realistic vs. stylized sound effects.

name: Compose Main Theme Music
description: Write and record the main theme music for the game that will be used in the title screen and key moments.

name: Record Sound Effects (Combat & UI)
description: Record or source sound effects for combat and UI interactions.

name: Full Level Design – Level 1
description: Design the complete layout for Level 1 including environment features enemy placement and objectives.

name: Full Level Design – Level 2 (Forest Village)
description: Design the layout for a forest village level balancing exploration areas and combat encounters.

name: Full Level Design – Level 3 (Ancient Ruins)
description: Create the layout for an ancient ruins level with vertical exploration and puzzle elements.

name: Model Enemy Type A (Grunt)
description: Model a common grunt enemy (mid-poly for in-game use) based on concept art.

name: Texture and Rig Enemy Type A (Grunt)
description: Apply textures to the grunt model and rig it for animations.

name: Model Enemy Type B (Ranged)
description: Model an enemy with ranged attacks with distinctive silhouette.

name: Texture and Rig Enemy Type B (Ranged)
description: Texture the ranged enemy model and rig it for animation.

name: Model Mini-Boss Character
description: Create a 3D model for a mid-game boss larger scale and more detail than standard enemies.

name: Texture and Rig Mini-Boss Character
description: Texture the mini-boss model and rig it ensuring the rig supports any unique anatomical features.

name: Model Environment Assets – Forest
description: Model trees rocks foliage and ground textures for the forest environments.

name: Texture Environment Assets – Forest
description: Create texture sets for forest assets and apply to models.

name: Model Environment Assets – Village
description: Build models for village structures and props.

name: Texture Environment Assets – Village
description: Texture the village structure models with wood straw and fabric materials consistent with art style.
